name: L-Tyrosine
summary: L-tyrosine is best framed for acute stress performance, sleep-deprivation focus, and cold or demanding-task resilience, with safety screening for MAOIs, hyperthyroidism, stimulant sensitivity, levodopa, and thyroid medication review.
